clientid: the code for the insurance company
fielid: an unique number for the specific run, to avoid the same file twice.
clientcontainer: name of the storage bucket (e.g., aws s3 bucket
currentfolderpath: the folder where the raw file is sitting
processedfolderpath: the folder where the python script should save the results (parquet/csv)
columndelimiter: for flat files, it tells the parser how to split columns (e.g., | or ,)
hasheader/ignoreheader: tells the code if the first row is just column names that should be skipped.
filelayoutid/filelayoutdescription: unique identifier(837p, 835,...) for the file, and a human-readable description.
schemafilepath/schemaname: path to the schema file that defines the structure of the data.
textqualifier: the character used to quote text fields in the file.
